languages.text: "Да хранит вас Бог-Император, Лорд-капитан. Мы восстановим линии обороны и начнем зачистку железных чудовищ".
"May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."
languages.original_text: "Да хранит вас Бог-Император, Лорд-капитан. Мы восстановим линии обороны и начнем зачистку железных чудовищ".

traits.locale_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."
"May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."
"May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."
"May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

languages.text: “愿神皇保佑您，舰长大人。我们会守好各个防线，着手肃清那些铁畜生。”
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: “愿神皇保佑您，舰长大人。我们会守好各个防线，着手肃清那些铁畜生。”

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator sizi korusun Lord Kaptan. Biz savunmalarla ilgilenecek ve şu demir canavarları arındırmaya başlayacağız."
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator sizi korusun Lord Kaptan. Biz savunmalarla ilgilenecek ve şu demir canavarları arındırmaya başlayacağız."

languages.text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu vous protège, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous allons nous occuper des défenses et commencer à purger ces bêtes de métal. »
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu vous protège, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous allons nous occuper des défenses et commencer à purger ces bêtes de métal. »

languages.text: «Que el Dios Emperador l{mf|e|a} proteja, Lord Capitán. Nos encargaremos de las defensas y empezaremos a purgar a esas bestias de hierro».
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: «Que el Dios Emperador l{mf|e|a} proteja, Lord Capitán. Nos encargaremos de las defensas y empezaremos a purgar a esas bestias de hierro».

languages.text: "Der Gottimperator schütze Euch, Lord Captain! Wir sehen nach den Verteidigungen und löschen diese Eisenbestien aus."
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: "Der Gottimperator schütze Euch, Lord Captain! Wir sehen nach den Verteidigungen und löschen diese Eisenbestien aus."

languages.text: 「神皇帝があなたを守り給え、キャプテン卿。我々は防衛にあたり、鉄の獣を駆逐する準備を始める。」
languages.original_text: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝があなたを守り給え、キャプテン卿。我々は防衛にあたり、鉄の獣を駆逐する準備を始める。」
